items.title: ExchangeRight’s $41 Million All-Cash 12 DST Fully Subscribed, Fueling Essential Income REIT Pipeline
items.description: PASADENA, Calif., September 09, 2025--ExchangeRight, one of the nation’s leading providers of diversified real estate DST and REIT investments, has announced the full subscription of Net-Leased All-Cash 12 DST, reflecting strong demand for the company’s historically recession-resilient, diversified net-leased offerings that support the growing acquisition pipeline for ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT. items.title: Sunrun, JELD-WEN, NN, Sherwin-Williams, and D.R. Horton Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
items.description: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after concerns about the health of the U.S. economy grew following a significant downward revision of job market data.
